TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Michael Jordan == Michael Jordan sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1963, ryax sa tay 2 nqu tay 17, Michael Jordan, squliq na Bunge'. qnxan nya Michael Jordan hya'ga minhtuw squ qalang na Brooklyn, New York. Michael Jordan maki tay kawas 1989 msqun ki Juanita Vanoy, maki tay kawas 2006 t'alax. pincyuwagan nya' Pzyux qu wayal niya' kirok ni Michael Jordan. ryax qnxan nqu Michael Jordan sa senmung pgnawgan mari'. plpgun ingalan nya' tinsu' minxal ga 30.1 teng. min 6.2 zningat nya' mari'zik na ttkran mari'. min 5.3 qu rnaw nya' magal tensu'. min 5 mspung sa pzyang balay maki' yunaw na sinsyuw na NBA. (1988, 1991, 1992, 1996, 1998) min 2magal sa thawki' balay sa (1987−1993, 1996−1998) na NBA. pzyang blaq balay giqas sinsyuw sa (1985) na NBA. champion NBA (1991–1993, 1996–1998). kingpay na tkura' mari' na mmlikuy sa kawas tay (1984, 1922) na Olympic Games. pspngan mari sa may yuryax na ptqs'un pawsa' mspunggal yacing cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players Basketball Hall of Fame AIR JORDAN讓我瞧 NBA历史:喬丹传记 NBA球员资料 Basketball-Reference.com:麥可·喬丹 BBC
S.PHON: == miʦ~ʨħael *or*an == miʦ~ʨħael *or*an s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj **, miʦ~ʨħael *or*an, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. qnxan nja miʦ~ʨħael *or*an ħjaʔɣa minħtuw s~ɕqu qalaŋ na βrookljn, new jork. miʦ~ʨħael *or*an maki taj kawas~ɕ **** ms~ɕqun ki *uanita *anoj, maki taj kawas~ɕ **** tʔalax. pinʦ~ʨjuwaɣan njaʔ pzjux qu wajal nijaʔ kirok ni miʦ~ʨħael *or*an. rjax qnxan nqu miʦ~ʨħael *or*an s~ɕa s~ɕenmuŋ pɣnawɣan mariʔ. plpɣun iŋalan njaʔ tins~ɕuʔ minxal ɣa **.* teŋ. min *.* zniŋat njaʔ mariʔzik na ttkran mariʔ. min *.* qu rnaw njaʔ maɣal tens~ɕuʔ. min * ms~ɕpuŋ s~ɕa pzjaŋ βalaj makiʔ junaw na s~ɕins~ɕjuw na nβa. (****, ****, ****, ****, ****) min *maɣal s~ɕa tħawkiʔ βalaj s~ɕa (*********, *********) na nβa. pzjaŋ βlaq βalaj ɣiqas~ɕ s~ɕins~ɕjuw s~ɕa (****) na nβa. ʦ~ʨħampion nβa (*********, *********). kiŋpaj na tkuraʔ mariʔ na mmlikuj s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj (****, ****) na oljmpiʦ~ʨ ɣames~ɕ. ps~ɕpŋan mari s~ɕa maj jurjax na ptqs~ɕʔun paws~ɕaʔ ms~ɕpuŋɣal jaʦ~ʨiŋ ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ βas~ɕketβall ħall o* *ame air *or*an*** nβa**:**** nβa**** βas~ɕketβall-re*erenʦ~ʨe.ʦ~ʨom:***** ββʦ~ʨ
S.FORM: == Michael Jordan == Michael Jordan sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1963, ryax sa tay 2 nqu tay 17, Michael Jordan, squliq na Bunge'. qnxan nya Michael Jordan hya'ga minhtuw squ qalang na Brooklyn, New York. Michael Jordan maki tay kawas 1989 msqun ki Juanita Vanoy, maki tay kawas 2006 t'alax. pincyuwagan nya' Pzyux qu wayal niya' kirok ni Michael Jordan. ryax qnxan nqu Michael Jordan sa senmung pgnawgan mari'. plpgun ingalan nya' tinsu' minxal ga 30.1 teng. min 6.2 zningat nya' mari'zik na ttkran mari'. min 5.3 qu rnaw nya' magal tensu'. min 5 mspung sa pzyang balay maki' yunaw na sinsyuw na NBA. (1988, 1991, 1992, 1996, 1998) min 2magal sa thawki' balay sa (1987−1993, 1996−1998) na NBA. pzyang blaq balay giqas sinsyuw sa (1985) na NBA. champion NBA (1991–1993, 1996–1998). kingpay na tkura' mari' na mmlikuy sa kawas tay (1984, 1922) na Olympic Games. pspngan mari sa may yuryax na ptqs'un pawsa' mspunggal yacing cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players Basketball Hall of Fame AIR JORDAN讓我瞧 NBA历史:喬丹传记 NBA球员资料 Basketball-Reference.com:麥可·喬丹 BBC
S.PHON: == miʦ~ʨħael *or*an == miʦ~ʨħael *or*an s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj **, miʦ~ʨħael *or*an, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. qnxan nja miʦ~ʨħael *or*an ħjaʔɣa minħtuw s~ɕqu qalaŋ na βrookljn, new jork. miʦ~ʨħael *or*an maki taj kawas~ɕ **** ms~ɕqun ki *uanita *anoj, maki taj kawas~ɕ **** tʔalax. pinʦ~ʨjuwaɣan njaʔ pzjux qu wajal nijaʔ kirok ni miʦ~ʨħael *or*an. rjax qnxan nqu miʦ~ʨħael *or*an s~ɕa s~ɕenmuŋ pɣnawɣan mariʔ. plpɣun iŋalan njaʔ tins~ɕuʔ minxal ɣa **.* teŋ. min *.* zniŋat njaʔ mariʔzik na ttkran mariʔ. min *.* qu rnaw njaʔ maɣal tens~ɕuʔ. min * ms~ɕpuŋ s~ɕa pzjaŋ βalaj makiʔ junaw na s~ɕins~ɕjuw na nβa. (****, ****, ****, ****, ****) min *maɣal s~ɕa tħawkiʔ βalaj s~ɕa (*********, *********) na nβa. pzjaŋ βlaq βalaj ɣiqas~ɕ s~ɕins~ɕjuw s~ɕa (****) na nβa. ʦ~ʨħampion nβa (*********, *********). kiŋpaj na tkuraʔ mariʔ na mmlikuj s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj (****, ****) na oljmpiʦ~ʨ ɣames~ɕ. ps~ɕpŋan mari s~ɕa maj jurjax na ptqs~ɕʔun paws~ɕaʔ ms~ɕpuŋɣal jaʦ~ʨiŋ ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ βas~ɕketβall ħall o* *ame air *or*an*** nβa**:**** nβa**** βas~ɕketβall-re*erenʦ~ʨe.ʦ~ʨom:***** ββʦ~ʨ
